issues.title: [Android] Long-pressing a TextInput that is unfocused (or focused with the keyboard dismissed) starts text selection but never shows the soft keyboard

triage.one_line_summary: Long-pressing an Android TextInput without a visible keyboard starts text selection but fails to show the soft keyboard
triage.why_easy: The issue is well-documented with a clear repro and IME traces showing exactly what's missing (no showSoftInput call), but the fix requires native Android code changes and device testing expertise

issues.title: `TextInput` emits `onChange` event with invalid `selection` on Android browser autofill

issues.title: [iOS] Prebuilt React-Core Release artifacts are built with NSAssertions enabled — RCTAssert failures become fatal NSRangeException crashes in production

triage.one_line_summary: Prebuilt React Native Core Release artifacts are compiled with NSAssertions enabled, causing production crashes when assert conditions fail
triage.why_easy: The root cause (missing NS_BLOCK_ASSERTIONS in Release build configuration) is clearly identified and likely requires minimal change, but the fix requires navigating the iOS build infrastructure and CI/CD artifact publishing pipeline

issues.title: [expo-router][iOS]: Using Apple Zoom transition with nested Native tabs and Stack causes issues in the Stack.Toolbar API

issues.title: Android NativeTabs: tab bar attaches/populates after screen content is presented on SDK 57

triage.why_easy: Clear reproduction steps, working baseline in SDK 54, and well-documented MRE; however, fixing requires deep knowledge of expo-router's NativeTabs initialization and the changes between SDK versions.

issues.title: [docs] MenuView documentation unclear on possible requirement for a Pressable child

triage.one_line_summary: Clarify whether Pressable wrapper is required in MenuView examples, or remove it if unnecessary

issues.title: patch-project doesn't revert CNG patch when run with --no-clean

issues.title: Dropping a URL into the editor from Firefox requires holding shift

issues.title: `list.find` doesn't match by file's directory path in reference view

issues.title: PERF: High overhead in DataFrame.apply(raw=True) due to np.apply_along_axis

issues.title: PERF: String column serialization in Interchange protocol is slow
